content.fact_text: Database Infrastructure Module for PostgreSQL using Knex, featuring serializable transactions, deadlock retries, and circuit breaker fault tolerance.

provenance_data.behaviour: Establishes a singleton DatabaseService using Knex, with Opossum circuit breaker integration for fault tolerance, serializable transaction support with deadlock retry logic, and structured Pino logging. Service includes lifecycle management (initialize, shutdown) and health checks.
interfaces: static initialize(config: unknown, logger: Logger): DatabaseService
runTransaction<T>(work: (trx: Knex.Transaction) => Promise<T>, retries?: number): Promise<T>
provenance_data.utility: Provides a production-grade, fault-tolerant database access layer for reconciliation, ensuring data integrity and service stability.
